title: Algorithmic co-arguers: AI-mediated argumentation and structural epistemic injustice
abstract: Explores AI-mediated argumentation and its role in structural epistemic injustice.

title: Hybrid intelligence systems as ontological mirrors of human cognition
abstract: Investigates hybrid intelligence systems as representations of human cognitive structures.

title: Multi-task model with attribute-specific heads for person re-identification
abstract: Proposes a multi-task learning framework with attribute-specific heads for improved person re-identification.

title: TriFusion hybrid model for human activity recognition
abstract: Introduces a hybrid TriFusion model for accurate human activity recognition.

title: YOLOv7-Based Multiple Surgical Tool Localization and Detection in Laparoscopic Videos
abstract: Presents a YOLOv7-based approach for detecting and localizing surgical tools in laparoscopic videos.

title: A Real-Time Laparoscopic Surgical Instrument Detection System Based on YOLOv5
abstract: Develops a real-time surgical instrument detection system using YOLOv5.

title: Novel Closed-Form Expressions for Ergodic Capacity of MIMO Ad-Hoc Networks
abstract: Derives closed-form expressions for evaluating ergodic capacity in MIMO ad-hoc networks.
